objective: 累计收益、年化收益、夏普比率必须提升；最大回撤尽可能变小
selectionMethod: Every stock is selected independently from the full-market candidate grid. The selector first requires positive total return, annual return, and Sharpe improvements. Among passing candidates it prefers positive max-drawdown improvement, then ranks by a weighted strict objective. Only when no candidate satisfies the three required improvements does it fall back to the best available candidate.
